description_long: This object is a large, wedge-shaped block of cheese with a pale yellow to beige color and a smooth, slightly glossy surface. The cheese is dotted with numerous round and irregularly shaped holes of varying sizes, giving it a classic Swiss or Emmental appearance. The block has clean, straight edges and a flat base, with the top surface sloping downward from back to front. The surface appears semi-soft, with subtle shading and highlights that suggest a creamy, pliable texture. There is no visible rind or packaging, and the cheese is presented as a solid, unadorned piece. The overall impression is of a substantial, freshly cut cheese block suitable for slicing or display.
description: A large, wedge-shaped block of pale yellow cheese with many round holes and a smooth, slightly glossy surface. The cheese has clean edges and no visible rind or packaging.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat, rectangular face of the cheese with several prominent holes and a smooth, slightly shiny surface.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the wedge shape, sloping top, and a variety of holes scattered across the surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the broad, flat back of the cheese with fewer visible holes and a mostly unblemished surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the angled cut and more holes, emphasizing the cheese's thickness and texture.
